response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Partially matched. The reference JSON provided lyrics for 'Dancing Reed' but none for '未来島-Future Island-'. 2. JSON Usage: Disambiguated the lyrics for 'Dancing Reed' using the provided text, while performing manual transcription and translation for '未来島-Future Island-' and the second half of 'Dancing Reed' which was missing in the reference. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed both songs tightly to match the rapid vocal pacing and instantaneous vocal transitions to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: ベガパンク！ 革命をここから ベガパンク！ Go!
subtitles.english: Vegapunk! Revolution starts here, Vegapunk! Go!

subtitles.english: To the lab on Future Island that will change the world!
